metadata.description: A TypeScript local-first collaborative knowledge workspace with real-time presence, offline sync, indexing/search, plugin support, and AI-assisted summarization.

Simple on-disk per-document snapshot store. Each document snapshot is persisted as an individual JSON file under the provided directory. This implementation is best-effort and swallows IO errors to avoid crashing the host process.

DocumentSnapshotService - Writes snapshots atomically using write-then-rename (tmp -> final) - Retains at least two most-recent snapshots per document (prunes older) - Performs all work asynchronously so live document writes are not blocked
Pluggable transport send function. Implementations wire WebSocket / WebRTC / etc.
SyncSessionTracker Manages per-peer sync session lifecycle. Emits events on an internal bus so multiple subsystems (SyncManager, PresenceTracker) can observe a single authoritative session view.

nodes.name: [MIGRATION] feat: flip Signal to generative bootstrap + fitness selection

metadata.author: Claude
metadata.description:
feat: flip Signal to generative bootstrap + fitness selection

Implements plan 001 (workspace/plans/001-generative-fitness-migration.md),
moving Signal from a curated/reductive fixture to a generative/selective demo.

SIG-001  framework_bootstrap.sh: generative is now the default; --curated opts
         back into the replayed baseline; loop runs `weave evolve` (generation +
         selection) alongside `weave resolve` (pure tension repair).
SIG-002  Demote the curated inject list to a regression baseline
         (scripts/baselines/signal_bootstrap.curated.json) and add
         check_bootstrap_drift.sh + lib/bootstrap_drift.mjs to report the
         rediscovery rate vs that baseline.
SIG-003  Standardise the app test suite as the fitness probe: convert sync tests
         to the configured vitest runner, drop stale committed build artifacts
         (sync.test.js/.d.ts), and document the fitness-probe + worktree
         isolation contract in ADR-004.
SIG-004  Add app/tests/summarizer.test.ts to ground the Summarizer capability for
         fitness selection (offline-first, deterministic, opt-in network).
SIG-005  The seeded boundary violations were already refactored onto PluginContext;
         update README to drop the now-false violation narrative so tensions come
         from emergent structure, not a pre-seeded answer key.
SIG-006  Author ADR-004 (generative-fitness model) and EXP-006 (generative
         emergence) / EXP-007 (fitness selection) with hypotheses and exit criteria.
SIG-007  Update README + framework-info to the generative-first loop, evolve, the
         rediscovery-rate metric, and the new bootstrap flags.
SIG-008/9 Configure the docs bridge in .weave/config.json: ingest workspace/ docs
         as seed context and write experiment/selection outcomes back into them;
         exclude workspace/ from Loom source crystallization.

All 33 app tests pass (vitest).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01DosnWmphkwAfB17oKW6qjB
